description: Letter from Mūsā b. Yaʿaqov al-Miṣrī, in Malīj, to Yosef b. David b. Shaʿyā, in Fustat. Dating: ca. 1056 CE. The writer deals with selling and buying goods for the partnership between the two. Mentions several names of people who are involved in their business. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 4, #684) VMR
description_he: מכתב מ-Malīj לפוסטאט. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
